team_name: BRIDGE — Bidirectional Real-time Interoperability for Distributed Government Entities
summary: Design a layer for bidirectional real-time interoperability using UBID as common join key between Karnataka's Single Window System and legacy department systems.
key_steps: Implement bidirectional propagation of service requests
Use UBID as common join key
missing_components: Detailed design and implementation guidelines for the BRIDGE system
